channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ebola outbreak in Congo kills dozens, Africa's CDC says
item.description: A new Ebola outbreak in a remote Congo province has resulted in 65 deaths and 246 suspected cases, according to the Africa CDC.

item.title: Two senators urge FAA to study effects of fewer flight attendants
item.description: Sens. Tammy Duckworth of Illinois and Tammy Baldwin of Wisconsin worry there may be more emergency exits than flight attendants on some flights.

item.title: Death toll in Kyiv apartment attack rises to 24
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy reports that a Russian missile strike on a Kyiv apartment building killed 24 people, including children.

item.title: Search underway off Maldives after five Italian divers die in cave accident
item.description: An Italian expert joins police divers and rescue vessels in the Maldives searching after five Italian divers died in a scuba accident.
